reviews.comment:
Si bien es una ypf, como cualquier otra, le doy una estrella más por ser del ACA, y esto conlleva a que este más limpia, ordenada y tenga un servicio más personalizado.

(Translated by Google)
Although it's a YPF station, like any other, I'm giving it an extra star because it's part of the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina), which means it's cleaner, more organized, and has a more personalized service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXOWRDVGV3EAE
